# TS9303

**Category:** Higher-Kinded Types · **Severity:** Error

## Message

```
@hkt type alias must contain `_` placeholder
```

## Explanation

The @hkt macro on a type alias expects the RHS to contain the `_` marker type
from @typesugar/type-system. The `_` marks where `this["__kind__"]` should go
in the generated TypeFunction interface.

Correct:
  import type { _ } from "@typesugar/type-system";
  /** @hkt */
  type ArrayF = Array&lt;_&gt;;

Incorrect:
  /** @hkt */
  type ArrayF = Array&lt;number&gt;;  // No _ placeholder

<!-- prettier-ignore-end -->
<!-- generated:end -->
